title: Amtech F1700 5 Piece masonry drill bit set
features: FOR LIGHTWEIGHT JOBS: This masonry drill bit set is suitable for light duty drilling in masonry and light density brick and block
VERSATILE: The bits can be used in most keyed and keyless drill chucks
SIZES: Supplied in plastic storage case, the set includes sizes 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 8mm and 10mm
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x masonry drill set 5 pc See more
